text.tspan: EXTERNALIZED CONFIGURATION: code does not embed config;
config is read from the environment at runtime,
so the SAME artifact runs in dev, staging, prod, EU, US.

g.text: CONFIG SOURCES (read at startup or on change)

text.tspan: u2022 ONE binary across all envs (no 'build for prod')
u2022 sensitive values NEVER in source / never in image
u2022 changing config does NOT need a redeploy
u2022 promotion = same artifact, new config
u2022 supports per-region, per-tenant, per-flag overrides
